reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(a)(1) focuses on access control, which is directly applicable to Kubernetes through RBAC and network policies. RBAC in Kubernetes can enforce least privilege by ensuring no excessive permissions are granted (e.g., avoiding cluster-admin roles) and by managing service account token usage. NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict network access, providing an additional layer of access control.
title: 164_312_a_1: 164.312(a)(1) Access control
